workloads.name: Bun ORT WebGPU provider compare Gemma-3 270M
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Bun ORT WebGPU compare for Gemma-3 270M using the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node workload on both sides, with Doe and bun-webgpu as the only varying WebGPU providers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict process-wall provider compare on Bun. Both sides use the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node WebGPU stack, the same ONNX model, the same tokenizer-accurate 32-token prompt budget, and the same 1-token decode target on the same host. The only intended execution difference is the WebGPU provider: Doe versus bun-webgpu (Dawn-backed package).

workloads.name: Bun ORT WebGPU provider compare Gemma-3 270M prefill 256 decode 1
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Bun ORT WebGPU compare for a prefill-heavy Gemma-3 270M shape using the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node workload on both sides, with Doe and bun-webgpu as the only varying WebGPU providers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict process-wall provider compare on Bun. Both sides use the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node WebGPU stack, the same ONNX model, the same tokenizer-accurate 256-token prompt budget, and the same 1-token decode target on the same host. The only intended execution difference is the WebGPU provider: Doe versus bun-webgpu (Dawn-backed package).
